on

Super Falcons head coach, Randy Waldrum has released the starting 11 to face Cameroon in the third round second leg 2024 Olympic Games qualifying fixture.

Waldrum released the list in a post via the Super Falcons’ official X account.

The match will take place on Monday evening by 4pm.

The first leg encounter had ended in a 0-0 draw last Friday.

Here is Super Falcons’ starting XI against Cameroon:

Chiamaka Nnadozie, Ashleigh Plumptre, Osinachi Ohale, Oluwatosin Demehin, Michelle Alozie, Deborah Abiodun, Christy Ucheibe, Jennifer Echegini, Toni Payne, Esther Okoronkwo and Rasheedat Ajibade.

The second leg match will take place at the MKO Abiola National Stadium, Abuja.

author: Don Silas
